WITH 4 MILES LEFT ON HV RANGE/DTE, I FILLED MY FIRST FULL TANK AT COSTCO. PUMP READ 10.82 GALLONS. NOW HV RANGE IS SHOWING 544 MILES. I GOT ABOUT 39.9 MPG ON FIRST TANK (WITHOUT EV) WHICH IS IN LINE WITH EPA. BUT MY REAL HV RANGE FROM FULL TO EMPTY WAS ONLY 10.9 X 39.5 = 430 MILE

narrative.headline: Air bag complaints dominate 2021 RAV4 owner reports
narrative.summary: Of 372 complaints filed with NHTSA, air bags are by far the top concern at 124 reports (33%) and the most serious to watch: owners tie them to 28 crashes and 34 injuries. After that, complaints drop off sharply into electrical (45, 12%), engine (36, 10%), structure (21, 6%) and fuel/propulsion (21, 6%) issues. Fires are rare but show up across the electrical, engine, air bag and fuel systems.

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: The single biggest issue: 124 reports (33%), linked to 28 crashes, 34 injuries and 1 fire. The one to watch most closely.
